data.label: Start: Intro to Data Science
data.description: Overview of the data science lifecycle, roles, and core tools.

data.label: Python for Data Science
data.description: Variables, data structures, loops, and functions in Python.

data.label: Math & Statistics Basics
data.description: Linear algebra basics, descriptive statistics, and probability.

data.label: Data Manipulation
data.description: Using Pandas and NumPy for cleaning and transforming data.

data.label: Data Visualization
data.description: Creating charts and graphs using Matplotlib and Seaborn.

data.label: Exploratory Data Analysis
data.description: Discovering patterns, spotting anomalies, and checking assumptions.

data.label: Intro to Machine Learning
data.description: Understanding supervised vs unsupervised learning and Scikit-Learn.

data.label: Supervised Learning
data.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, and decision trees.

data.label: Unsupervised Learning
data.description: K-Means clustering and Principal Component Analysis (PCA).

data.label: Model Evaluation
data.description: Cross-validation, hyperparameter tuning, and ROC/AUC metrics.

data.label: Intro to Deep Learning
data.description: Basic neural networks using TensorFlow or PyTorch.

data.label: SQL & Databases
data.description: Querying relational databases to extract datasets.

data.label: Model Deployment Basics
data.description: Serving models via APIs using Flask, FastAPI, or Streamlit.

data.label: Capstone Project
data.description: End-to-end data science project from raw data to deployed model.

data.label: Job Ready: Junior Data Scientist
data.description: Portfolio building, resume optimization, and interview prep.
